steps: Sign up with your email or continue with Google (no credit card required)
Once logged in, navigate to the API Keys section in your dashboard
Your default API key is displayed — copy it, or click 'Create API key' to generate a new one
Paste the key as the Authorization header value in your requests (no prefix needed)

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your AssemblyAI API key, sent as the Authorization header with no prefix

notes: Free tier available — no credit card required to sign up
Multiple API keys are supported; you can create and label them per project
Keys are partially hidden in the dashboard by default; copy them when created
Rate limits depend on your plan; free tier is suitable for testing
Transcription is pay-per-use after the free quota

test_endpoint.description: List transcripts to verify your API key is valid
